resources.string: Bul jerde klaviaturanı sınap kórseńiz boladı
A virtual keyboard for the Karakalpak language, supporting both Latin (QQ) and Cyrillic (ҚҚ) scripts. Built with Jetpack Compose.

• Latin and Cyrillic Karakalpak layouts
• Word suggestions with personal learning
• Emoji panel with recent emoji tracking
• Auto-capitalization after sentences
• Double-space converts to period
• Double-tap Shift for Caps Lock
• Haptic and sound feedback
Go to Android Settings → System → Language & Input → On-screen keyboard, then enable QqKeyboard.
Tap the keyboard icon in the navigation bar while typing, or use the button below.

Switch layout — Tap the QQ / ҚҚ button in the bottom-left corner to toggle between Latin and Cyrillic scripts.

Shift — Tap once for one uppercase letter. Double-tap or long-press to enable Caps Lock. Tap again to turn Caps Lock off.

Numbers & symbols — Tap the 123 button to switch to numbers and symbols. Tap ABC to return to letters.

Emoji — Tap the smiley face button to open the emoji panel.

Suggestions — Word suggestions appear in the strip above the keyboard as you type. Tap a suggestion to insert it.

Double-space — When enabled, double-tapping Space inserts a period and space to end a sentence quickly.

• The keyboard remembers which layout (Latin or Cyrillic) you last used.

• When Auto-capitalization is enabled, the first letter of a new sentence is automatically capitalized.

• Hold Backspace to delete characters continuously.

• Recently used emojis appear in the Recent tab of the emoji panel.

• The suggestion strip learns from your word choices over time to improve future suggestions.

Auto-capitalization — Automatically capitalizes the first letter after sentence-ending punctuation (., !, ?).

Auto-space after punctuation — Adds a space automatically after you type certain punctuation marks.

Auto-remove space before punctuation — Removes any trailing space when you type punctuation, so there is no unwanted space before it.

Double-space to period — Double-tapping Space converts the double space into a period and space, making it easy to end sentences.

Theme — Choose the keyboard color theme.

Suggestions — Shows a word suggestion strip above the keyboard. Tap a suggestion to insert it instantly. Not shown for password fields.

Keyboard height — Choose between Default and Short key rows.

Key background — Show or hide individual key backgrounds.

Top row layout — Choose whether the top row shows extra language-specific letters (e.g. á, ǵ, ú, ń) or numbers (1–9, 0) with long-press for the corresponding letters.

Key press sound — Plays a click sound on each key press.

Vibration — Vibrates on each key press.

Vibration intensity — Adjusts the vibration strength: Light, Medium, or Strong. Only available when Vibration is enabled.
